testcase.name: testConsistency_ConcurrentUpdates
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-26T11:58:35.109+08:00 INFO 14984 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.shortlink.cache.CacheTest$CacheConsistencyTest]: CacheConsistencyTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-04-26T11:58:35.112+08:00 INFO 14984 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.shortlink.ShortLinkApplication for test class com.shortlink.cache.CacheTest$CacheConsistencyTest Creating a new SqlSession SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4ff7de80] was not registered for synchronization because synchronization is not active JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1139712957 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA] will not be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT id,username,password,phone,mail,real_phone,real_mail,del_flag,create_time,update_time FROM link_user WHERE del_flag=0 AND (username = ?) ==> Parameters: cache_test_user_1777175915119(String) <== Total: 0 Closing non transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4ff7de80] Creating a new SqlSession SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2cd6112b] was not registered for synchronization because synchronization is not active JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@2139024047 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA] will not be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO link_user ( id, username, password, real_phone, real_mail, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?
